description: You are an Access Consultant tasked with modeling a compliant accessible entrance ramp for the FZK-Haus residential building, which is pre-loaded in Bonsai. Create an IFC ramp assembly at the main entrance that includes an IfcRamp, IfcRampFlight, and IfcRailing on both sides. Add a property to the ramp or flight indicating its slope or gradient (the property name must contain 'slope' or 'gradient'). Ensure all ramp elements are spatially contained within the building storey. Save the IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_accessible.ifc.
